description: Run tracking for the Bronze/Copper pipeline: one row per well processed, capturing mode, lookback window, source signature/rows, algorithm version, and status. Written last in each stage so a run is only visible after its outputs are persisted.
sql: SELECT fleet_name, pad_name, name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS stage_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS mode, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS algorithm_version, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS active_run_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS source_signature, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS source_rows, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS lookback_start_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS first_source_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS last_source_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS latest_source_updated_at, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS processed_at, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS status FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
